eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Utah; at 4:38 PM on JUN 12, 2026 Effective until 9:38 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a non family abduction. The first suspect is identified as Marie Erika Lynn Marsh. She is 5 feet 4 inches tall, weighing 150 pounds. She has black hair and brown eyes. The first child abduction victim is identified by police as Raymond Vigil. He is 9 and was wearing last seen  red nike shirt nike sweat pants white nike shoes. He has brown hair and brown eyes. He is 4 feet 8 inches tall, weighing about 130 pounds. The abduction happened at South Salt Lake. The suspect was driving a white Ford. If you have any information, please call Police at 8 0 1 8 4 0 4 0 0 0 or simply dial 9 1 1.
